tokens.purpose: Light-mode design language source: color, typography, radius, spacing, size, and compatibility aliases.
tokens.downstreamRule: Use canonical --bg-*, --text-*, --icon-*, --border-*, --status-*, --radius-*, and --spacer-* tokens first. Treat --color-* and legacy aliases as compatibility names.

components.purpose: Component-level markup, classes, token consumption, DOM anatomy, assets, and provenance.
components.downstreamRule: Copy markup from preview/component-{slug}.html, link colors_and_type.css + components.css, and keep page-local showcase layout out of shared component CSS.

icons.purpose: Bundled TraeWork SVG assets. assets/icons is the only supported icon directory.
icons.downstreamRule: Use assets/icons/{name}.svg. Use currentColor-capable SVGs or CSS masks for monochrome icons that must inherit token color; keep hardcoded-color SVGs for brand or multicolor artwork only. No icons.js runtime is shipped.

uikit.purpose: Page-level visual showcase and component-composition evidence.
uikit.downstreamRule: Read UIKit pages for structure and product patterns, but do not copy the outer .uikit-shell/app-shell/solo shell as a production page template. Use component previews for reusable markup.

modeA_staticImg.useFor: Static HTML and React where no runtime recoloring is required.

modeB_currentColorMask.useFor: Monochrome icons that must follow CSS color tokens in controls.
modeB_currentColorMask.rule: The parent color must resolve to a token such as var(--icon-default), var(--text-default), var(--status-error-default), or var(--text-onbrand).

iconUsage.colorRule: Do not edit shipped SVG geometry or invent arbitrary icon colors. Add a semantic token first when a new fixed tint is required.

useTokensOnly.consume: Link the CSS or read css.json for machine consumption.

buildSingleComponent.consume: Copy component markup from preview and keep canonical class names.

buildFullPageCustomCanvas.consume: Use UIKit as structural reference; write your own responsive outer grid for the target canvas.

uikitConstraints.warningForDownstream: UIKit pages are showcases with an outer shell cap. Do not use them as fixed production templates on wider canvases.

standardComparison.reason: TraeWork has its own component inventory; parity work should focus on library contracts, token readability, icon rules, and reference integrity.
